fields.label: Activation Mode
fields.options:
Always Active
After Requirement
Credits Passed
Course Passed
On Document Status
Time Offset

fields.description: Defaults from the Graduation Requirement Item but is overridable per program: tick it here to make the requirement mandatory for this program (e.g. mandatory for MABC, optional for MDiv). This per-program value is what the student snapshot (SGR) treats as truly required.
fields.label: Is Mandatory

fields.description: Defaults from the Graduation Requirement Item but is overridable per program. When checked, the student cannot file a Graduation Request until this requirement is Fulfilled or Waived. Only meaningful when the requirement is mandatory.
fields.label: Blocks Graduation Request

fields.description: How many instances the student must satisfy. Only meaningful for Manual Verification (e.g. '8 chapel attendances'). Event Attendance and Linked Document always count as 1.
fields.label: Quantity Required

fields.description: Total internship hours this program requires for this internship. Overrides the Internship Type's default, so one type (e.g. Worship) can require different hours per program.
fields.label: Internship Hours Required

fields.description: This requirement becomes active only after the selected library requirement (in this same program's policy) reaches Fulfilled or Waived status. To require more than one prerequisite, chain requirements (each After Requirement pointing at the previous one).
fields.label: Prerequisite Requirement

fields.description: This requirement becomes active only once the student has passed this course (a Program Enrollment Course with status 'Pass'). A single passing attempt satisfies the gate permanently — even for a repeatable course, regardless of any other attempt. 'Course Passed' and 'After Requirement' are mutually exclusive; to gate on both a course and a prior requirement, chain two requirements (the first using Course Passed, the second using After Requirement on the first).
fields.label: Prerequisite Course

fields.description: Leave empty to apply this requirement to every student in the program. Pick an emphasis (a Program Track marked as emphasis) to scope it: the requirement materializes only for students who have declared that emphasis (advisory-only emphases never count), and is added when the student declares it — even after enrollment. To apply one requirement to several emphases, add it once per emphasis; a student in more than one gets a single row (deduped by requirement).
fields.label: Applies to Emphasis

fields.description: This requirement becomes active only once the student's total passed credits (Program Enrollment.totalcredits — the sum of Program Enrollment Course credits with status 'Pass') reaches this number.
fields.label: Credits Passed to Activate

fields.description: Status value (e.g. 'Approved', 'Completed') that indicates the linked document fulfills this requirement. Checked first against workflow_state, then against status. Capitalization matters.
fields.label: On Document Status
Offset Anchor
fields.options:
Expected Graduation Date
Last Term Starts
Program Starts

fields.description: Use positive or negative whole numbers
fields.label: Offset Value
